author: @thebluestlime58
text:
good guide so far, just really need to address the point about "selling low-value Strikes and Defenses", because you can actively brick your run if you're not careful

Strike and Defense cards are among the primary sources of Aliemus (Ult gauge) for a character, and also, some characters (especially newer ones) have mechanics directly tied to those cards (e.g. Arachne's Strike/Defense cards, when paired with her signature relic, allow her to trigger her follow-up attacks for free, and those normally take some time and effort to get access to)

author: @louashfield5902
text:
I truly wish this video came earlier before I started playing Morimens. I lost too many times until I had to invest to make a strong team that can at least survive the boss fights. I regret a lot of my investments, but I somehow made it to Chapter 7 at least.


I currently play "Erica (Main damage dealer), Ogier  (To get shields and Stength boosts ), Doll (Coz I need to heal somehow sometimes) and Nymphaea (To deal damage with Poison). Erica becomes mighty powerful with Dupes and you even get to have high shields and Damage with her X  card. I also equip the green covenant called Deus (I think) that give extra Arithmetica so Erica's X Card can go wild.


With time, I realized that Doll is really not that useful, even after spending a lot into her, yet her healing did get me out of tough spots sometimes.

Thanks for the guide. I will rewatch it again when I need a reminder of your tips and hints.
video_title: A Full Beginner Guide to Morimens (2026 Edition)

author: @blumstein3468
text:
14:47 A correction: the Rose Scrip shop has Mimetic Crystals and Aetheric Shards on offer. These are time-limited materials you SHOULD get because of their rarity. It will take time before you accumulate enough to make a difference, but every bit helps.






Really happy to see this video, Pseychie. I was eventually convinced to give this game a try from a certain video on its themes and history. Hopefully, more coverage on Morimens will attract more players that gel with its vibe and difficulty. The game is a gem so against the grain of the current gacha landscape, that I hope its relevance and continuation would inspire similar  titles to pop up within and outside of the gacha sphere.
video_title: A Full Beginner Guide to Morimens (2026 Edition)

author: @Xovian
text:
Dam it Jim!
Gonna make me play it again. 
I've been gone for about 4 (maybe even 6) months give or take.

Though i would say you missed one important thing. Morimens is about building teams, this is especially true once you hit the second Arc. While getting a good unit will help an account in the long run, it wont necessarily give you progression if you don't have some good synergies to go with them. Wheels can make or break a team in the end game, so knowing what you plan to aim is a huge boon. And if ya dont have a plan, get one! Whether you toil it yourself or get a reliable plan for units/wheels from other players recommendations, but have one and try to see it through! It will save you in the long term. May not open every door in the game for you, but having at least one fully competitive deck can help a ton.

Still i'd say overall: Good vid.  Think you covered the basics for pretty much everything, and even though i know the game, some of the names (like keyflare) are still so un
video_title: A Full Beginner Guide to Morimens (2026 Edition)

author: @deyzunasbunker
text: Do not worry about meta units from the beginning, it's gonna take TIME until meta is slightly relevant. People have beat the hardest shit in the game with soft cap starter characters (soft cap is lv 60 and max is lv 90, which is really hard to reach), so even though the game is difficult, it has leeway for skill enough that whatever you do will work out. I looked around a lot when I started to see which units I should avoid and they are VERY few. Tier lists are shitty because some C/D tier characters are super strong picks in specific teams, so just go at it man...
video_title: A Full Beginner Guide to Morimens (2026 Edition)

author: @PS.Starve
text:
Таймкоды:
00:00 — Вступление: обзор нового патча и персонажа Понтоса (царство Эквор).
00:30 — Обзор карточек и способностей Понтоса
02:21 — Разбор созвездий (конст) и их полезность.
03:09 — Геймплей за Понтоса в пробнике
05:12 — Использование режима «Девятый вал» и ульты.
07:56 — Советы по сборке команды и синергии с другими персонажами.
08:29 — Обзор остального контента патча: коллаборация, баннеры и награды.
09:43 — Ивенты: боссы, миссии и магазин события.
10:04 — Анонс будущих реранов и завершение.
video_title: Понтос с потенциалом. Новый патч и новый персонаж в Morimens
